benefits.description: Lost 75 lbs since September (approximately 5 months), described as all fat with no muscle loss based on body scans
Maintained muscle mass while losing fat, verified by body scans
Reduces cravings when combined with proper nutrition protocol

protocol_notes: Comprehensive protocol: 100+ grams protein daily (target 1g per lb goal weight), 200g protein example (800 calories), 10,000 steps daily, 7+ hours consistent sleep, vegetables-protein-carbs eating order, half body weight in water daily, eliminated simple sugars, increased good fats (taco salads, full-calorie chicken soup, nuts). Aims for ~10 lbs per month loss rate to preserve muscle and avoid loose skin.
